mapper.sql: id, session_id, user_id, refresh_token_hash, status, issued_at, refresh_expires_at, last_refreshed_at, last_seen_at, revoked_at, revoke_reason, client_ip_hash, user_agent_hash, user_agent_summary, version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_sessions ( session_id, user_id, refresh_token_hash, status, issued_at, refresh_expires_at, last_refreshed_at, last_seen_at, revoked_at, revoke_reason, client_ip_hash, user_agent_hash, user_agent_summary, version ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{refreshTokenHash}, #{status}, #{issuedAt}, #{refreshExpiresAt}, #{lastRefreshedAt}, #{lastSeenAt}, #{revokedAt}, #{revokeReason}, #{clientIpHash}, #{userAgentHash}, #{userAgentSummary}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_sessions SET last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE auth_sessions SET status = 'REVOKED', revoked_at = #{revokedAt}, revoke_reason = #{revokeReason}, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE auth_sessions SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
